channel.title: Tutorials on Hugo O. Rivera
channel.description: Recent content in Tutorials on Hugo O. Rivera

item.title: HelloWorlds
item.description: What is programming? Here you’ll find lots of introductory projects for many of different applications written in a variety of notable programming languages.

item.title: You, Node.js Development, and Docker
item.description: My take on developing Node.js projects using Docker.

item.title: Some General Cybersecurity Advice
item.description: A mishmash of what could be common-sense security tips and other ideas for preventing security leaks on personal devices.

item.title: Notes on Chemistry the Central Science
Notes on Perception for Design
item.description: I took concise notes based on the excellent, scientifically-rigorous textbook Information Visualization: Perception for Design by Colin Ware. I created this PDF using LaTeX, which allowed me the flexibility to create an easy-to-edit, elegant, and compact document layout. I highly recommend the book and these notes for anyone that needs to create data visualizations. See here.
